frame_analyses.description: Gauze suspended between clamps with circular marking visible, scissors positioned at entry point
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good setup with clear circular pattern marked on gauze

frame_analyses.description: Scissors making initial entry cut at bottom of circle
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean entry point, scissors perpendicular to material

frame_analyses.description: Cutting progressing clockwise around circle, maintaining steady progression
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Smooth cutting motion, following marked line closely

frame_analyses.description: Continued clockwise cutting, approximately halfway around circle
Cutting approaching top of circle, maintaining close proximity to marked line
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good control and precision maintained throughout

frame_analyses.description: Final portion of cut being completed, circular piece nearly freed
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Approaching closure of circle with good precision

frame_analyses.description: Task completed - circular piece cut out and separated from gauze
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean completion with circular piece removed

penalties.description: Minor deviations from marked line at multiple points, estimated 1-2mm average

confidence_rationale: Clear visualization of cutting process and completion. Deviation measurements estimated from visible distance from marked line, though precise millimeter measurements challenging from video angle.
cannot_determine: Exact millimeter deviations at all cardinal points due to camera angle and resolution limitations
technique_summary: Expert-level performance with excellent time (63s vs 60-90s expert benchmark) and good precision. Clean, steady cutting technique with minimal deviations from marked line.
strengths: Excellent completion time placing in expert range
Complete cut with no incomplete sections
improvement_suggestions: Focus on even tighter adherence to marked line to minimize deviation penalties
Consider slightly slower cutting speed in areas where precision is most critical
